current_stage: Phase 6: Security Hardening, Integration Testing & EXE Deployment Prep (In Progress)

operations_log.description: Created myBIZcon subfolder, implementation_plan.md and task.md. Pre-configured the cumulative tracker.

Initialized empty git repository in d:\Python Programs\Empecting\myBIZcon, connected to https://github.com/Gimsphil/myBIZcon.git, set branch to main, staged all plans (README, implementation plan, tracker), committed and pushed successfully.

operations_log.action: Add prompt templates and REST mock simulation client
operations_log.description: Created templates/relationship_prompts.py containing Boss, Client, Coworker, Family prompts, multi-party group chat context, and meeting minutes generation context. Added mock_test_client.py with pure REST Python implementation and no external dependencies. Committed and pushed successfully.

operations_log.action: Add local task list to Git
operations_log.description: Created and synchronized task.md in the project subdirectory for public development checklist tracking. Committed and pushed successfully.
Created walkthrough.md documenting all achievements and validation results, synchronized successfully on GitHub.

operations_log.action: Complete Phase 2 MVP - Android Client & FastAPI Workspace Sync
operations_log.description: Developed Android Accessibility configuration and service class for scraping group and direct chats. Created floating overlay service supporting three translation display modes. Built FastAPI backend main server including Workspace endpoints for Calendar schedules, Tasks injection, and Drive Markdown transcript backups. Committed and pushed successfully.
Updated walkthrough.md documenting Phase 2 accomplishments, layout details, and API server pathways, synchronized successfully on GitHub.

operations_log.action: Complete Phase 2.5 - PC Client & APK Build Setup
operations_log.description: Created beautiful Tkinter PC Desktop Client containing system status monitors, active context simulator, and floating transparent Windows subtitle overlays. Set up full Android Gradle project layout (build.gradle, settings.gradle) and an automated build batch compiler (build_apk.bat) producing app-debug.apk under Windows. Committed and pushed successfully.

Created and synchronized mybizcon_chronicle.md inside the project workspace directory to preserve full context history, dialogue archives, technical choices, and environment setup guidelines for immediate replication on any other PC. Committed and pushed successfully.

operations_log.action: Complete Phase 3 & 3.5 MVP - Audio DSP Preprocessing, Speaker Diarization, Voice Pipelines, and Web Copilot
operations_log.description: Developed PC client audio recorder module with dynamic VAD RMS Noise Gate and High-Pass Filters. Coded Whisper STT & ElevenLabs TTS voice pipelines. Created diarization engine using Gemini multimodal audio context with automated Workspace calendar/task sync and speaker tone emotion tracking. Update client UI and push origin successfully.

operations_log.action: Complete Phase 4 - Multi-Messenger Platform Adapters & Zero-Dependency RAG Indexing
operations_log.description: Developed Slack (markdown prioritized, bullet lists), KakaoTalk (friendly tone, localized honorifics, compact mobile bubble spacing), Telegram, and WhatsApp adapters in relationship engine. Built pure-python Vector Space TF-IDF and Cosine Similarity RAG engine scanning historical Drive backups for semantic few-shot style replication. Integrated platform selection combobox and RAG manual reindexing button in Tkinter PC Client dashboard.

operations_log.action: AI Reviewer Control Integration for agy and codex CLIs
operations_log.description: Formally integrated agy CLI and codex CLI auto-approval and remote control configurations. Analyzed CLI executable flags, discovering --dangerously-skip-permissions for agy and --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox / --ask-for-approval never for codex to programmatically bypass interactive prompts. Integrated this audit decision into the permanent documentation guides.

operations_log.action: Technical reviewer audit of Phase 4 code, records, and GitHub synchronization
operations_log.description: Confirmed local HEAD and GitHub origin/main are synchronized at ffba3fa6ac71236824429d07ed2e85cf8d880636 before later local documentation edits. Python compile checks passed for backend, pc_client, templates, and mock_test_client.py. Recorded open review findings: permissive FastAPI CORS, unauthenticated /workspace/index RAG reindex endpoint, localhost-only voice file_path ingestion, Android build completeness risk from manifest resources/MainActivity assumptions, Android overlay-to-accessibility injection design bug, and high-risk documentation of CLI permission bypass flags that should not be treated as a default reviewer workflow.

operations_log.action: Multi-Agent Chat Dialogue Archive Generation & Push Gate Control
operations_log.description: Formally enforced push gate restriction limiting GitHub commit and push rights solely to the AI Reviewer (Antigravity). Wrote a custom robust PowerShell parsing script to decode JSONL conversation transcripts into high-fidelity UTF-8 with BOM formats, resolving emojis and Korean CP949 encoding bugs. Archived the full chat screen history to agent_dialogue_archive.md.

operations_log.action: Phase 6 Step 15 - AGY: Security Hardening (CORS, API Key Auth, Path Traversal)
operations_log.description: Upgraded backend/app/config.py with SECRET_API_KEY, ALLOWED_ORIGINS whitelist, SAFE_RECORDINGS_ROOT env vars and python-dotenv support. Hardened main.py: replaced wildcard CORS with env-based whitelist, added X-API-Key dependency for /workspace/index, added path traversal guard (validate_recording_path) for /voice/meeting. Updated requirements.txt with python-dotenv.

operations_log.action: Phase 6 Step 16 - CODEX: Integration Test Suite (pytest-based)
operations_log.description: Created backend/tests/ directory with __init__.py, test_rag_engine.py (19 test cases covering corpus indexing, TF-IDF, cosine similarity, tokenization, retrieval), test_api_endpoints.py (smoke tests for all FastAPI endpoints including security guard validation), test_relationship_engine.py (platform adapter routing, Korean honorifics, FAMILY/BOSS tone, async mocked generate_replies).

operations_log.action: Phase 6 Step 17 - AGY: PC Client PyInstaller EXE Deployment Prep
operations_log.description: Created pc_client/pyinstaller_build.spec (single-file windowed EXE spec with hiddenimports for tkinter, threading, audio), pc_client/build_exe.bat (auto-build Windows batch script with error handling and UX feedback), pc_client/requirements_pc.txt (includes pyinstaller>=5.0 and python-dotenv). All 5 new/modified files passed py_compile syntax checks.
